title: You can't touch grass!
description: Whenever you touch a grass_block, you die!
body:
# When you touch a `grass_block`, you die!

This Minecraft datapack adds a challenge: if you step on a grass block, you die instantly. 
Perfect for hardcore or challenge worlds.

**Don't worry! When you spawn in your world/server with this datapack, a sand block spawns underneath you!**

## Gallery

The sand block that spawns underneath you once you join:

![The sand block that spawns underneath you once you join.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9daf51ee521e3cf5c436595328ac4872458626c6_0.webp)

When you die to the grass block:

![When you die to the grass block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a7cd98bd9327fc11df38d9edb9e55312fc32a44.png)

Message once you join:

![Message once you join.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e30fc1021c76309e87d6cdd041285c131520d2bf.png)
